functions.name: omamer._utils.auto_open
documentation:
Opens files based on their "magic bytes". Supports bz2 and gzip. If it
finds neither of these, presumption is it is a standard, uncompressed
file.

classes.name: omamer.sequence_buffer.SequenceBuffer

methods.name: omamer.sequence_buffer.SequenceBuffer.__init__
documentation:
args:
 - seqs: list of sequences
 - ids: list of corresponding ids

methods.name: omamer.sequence_buffer.SequenceBuffer.add_seqs
documentation: def __getstate__(self):
return (self.prot_nr, self.n, self.buff_shr, self.buff_idx_shr)
def __setstate__(self, state):
(self.prot_nr, self.n, self.buff_shr, self.buff_idx_shr) = state

methods.name: omamer.sequence_buffer.SequenceBuffer.get_seqlen
documentation: def __getitem__(self, i):
s = int(self.idx[i])
e = int(self.idx[i + 1] - 1)
return self.buff[s:e].tobytes().decode("ascii")
enables the use of numba for lists of sequences.

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.binom_neglogccdf
documentation: Use pbinom from RMath4

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.fam_res_compare
documentation: Compare two family results and order them according to normcount, overlap and pvalue.
family result sorting

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.fam_res_less
documentation: Same as fam_res_compare, but operates as '<'

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.fam_res_le
documentation: Same as fam_res_compare, but operates as '<='

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.fam_res_greater
documentation: Same as fam_res_compare, but operates as '>'

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.fam_res_ge
documentation: Same as fam_res_compare, but operates as '>='

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.family_result_argsort
documentation:
argsort of family results using defined comparison above.
uses an implementation of quicksort.
note: np.argsort DOES NOT support struct type in numba. this code does.

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.family_result_sort
documentation:
Sort the family results according to normcount, overlap and pvalue (to break ties).
this uses a quicksort implementation as np.argsort does not support struct type in numba.

functions.name: omamer.merge_search._partition
documentation:
Index-based version of the partition algorithm of
quicksort. Juggles indexes of the idx array that
indexes the x array, considering the range [low, high].

functions.name: omamer.merge_search._select
documentation: Select the k'th largest element of the x array

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.get_fam_hog2parent
documentation: get HOG parent offsets of a single family
# generic functions

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.get_fam_level_offsets
documentation: get HOG level offsets of a single family

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.custom_unique1d
documentation: adapted from np._unique1d for numba
# search functions

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.unique1d_linear
documentation: Find a set of unique elements in linear time

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.parse_seq
documentation: get the sequence unique k-mers and non ambiguous locations (when truly unique)

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.search_seq_kmers
documentation: Perform the kmer search, using the index.

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.cumulate_counts_1fam
documentation: # functions to cumulate HOG k-mer counts

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.store_bestpath
documentation: # generic score functions

functions.name: omamer.merge_search.get_closest_taxa_from_ref
documentation:
Based on the predicted HOG, we find the closest implied taxon from the reference taxon.
 - if the reference taxon is implied in the HOG (descendant of root-taxon and ancestor of child-HOG taxa), we report the reference taxon (at level).
 - if the root-taxon is one of its ancestors, we report the first ancestor that is defined within the HOG child-HOG taxa (more general).
   (basically the speciation before the duplication delimiting the HOG from the reference taxon)
 - otherwise, we simply report the HOG root-taxon ('more specific' or 'different lineage').
 - na if not placed

methods.name: omamer.merge_search.MergeSearch.trans
documentation: want to cache these, so that we don't load multiple times when chunking queries

modules.name: omamer.HOGParser
documentation:
HOGPROP - Propagation of Gene Ontology (GO) annotations through
Hierarchical Orthologous Groups (HOGs) from the OMA project.

(C) 2024 Nikolai Romashchenko <nikolai.romashchenko@unil.ch>
(C) 2015-2023 Alex Warwick Vesztrocy <alex@warwickvesztrocy.co.uk>

This file is part of HOGPROP. It contains a module for parsing an
OrthoXML file which represents a set of Hierarchical Orthologous
Groups (HOGs).

HOGPROP is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
it under the terms of the GNU Lesser General Public License as published by
the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or
(at your option) any later version.

HOGPROP is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
GNU Lesser General Public License for more details.

You should have received a copy of the GNU Lesser General Public License
along with HOGPROP.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.

functions.name: omamer.HOGParser.is_evolutionary_node
documentation: Returns true if the node is either orthologGroup or paralogGroup.
Helper functions

documentation: Returns true if the node is of type orthologGroup.

documentation: Returns true if the node has the tag name defined.

documentation:
Returns the name of an OrthoXML tag name. This is used for adding
elements to the XML, externally.

documentation: Cleans up a node.

documentation: Deletes a list of nodes.

HOG level IDs
HOG level IDs

classes.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.__init__
documentation: Initialises species list with a dictionary

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.clear_xref
documentation: Remove species object XRefs.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.__iter__
documentation: Iterate through species.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.__getitem__
documentation:
Gets and returns a species object. Tries based on name first, then
attempts species code and then NCBI.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.get_species
documentation:
Gets a species (name) from a gene ID, based on ID range.
Makes assumption that all gene ids are contiguous integers in the header file.
This might need to be replaced for more general OrthoXML.
NOTE: this might not work with non-OMA. Unsure of standard for this.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.resolve_xref
documentation: Resolve an xref mapping query.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies._resolve_xref
documentation: Resolve an xref mapping query.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.get_xref_types
documentation: Returns a list of the xref types.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.get_xref
documentation:
Gets a specific type of external reference for a particular ID, if
it exists.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.AllSpecies.load_extra_xrefs
documentation:
Load the extra XRefs - these are not "typed" by different xref
sources, so ensure to handle them carefully. The format is the same
as the OMA download files.

Note: there is currently an assertion that the is_oma flag must also
      be set, however this isn't strictly necessary.
HOG Parsing classes

documentation: Iterates over species, yielding them until we hit the groups node.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOGParser.HOGs
documentation:
Iterates over HOGs, yielding them. If in low mem, remove them
(call cleanup) as soon as done with them to save memory!

auto_clean=True will delete the HOG from the XML structure after
the yield.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOGParser._HOG
documentation:
Returns a HOG object for a node. This allows us to override this for
HOGPROP and other uses.
HOG parser interface.

Initialise the HOG object. This extracts the ID and saves the
XML element.

documentation: Finds and retrieves all direct children 'property' tags.

Retrieve the distance to the parent from a node, if it has been

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.levels

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.tostring

Serialises the XML that this object represents into a string and
returns it.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.tonewick
documentation:
Converts HOG to Newick format and returns it.

Func will be called to return the distances on a node. This can be
used to include belief in a certain label into the newick string...

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.tonhx
documentation: Converts HOG to NHX format and returns it.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.cleanup
documentation: Cleanup the HOG, so that it will be removed by the GC.

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.__getstate__
documentation: Returns the state of the object for pickle (multiproc uses this).

methods.name: omamer.HOGParser.HOG.__setstate__
documentation: Loads the state of the object from a pickle (multiproc uses this).
Represents a single HOG XML node / tree.
